items.name_en: L вҠҡ в„® w в„® рҹҢҹ New Version рҹҶ• Small Soft Grain Calfskin Puzzle Edge Handbag
items.name_cn:
L вҠҡ в„® w в„® рҹҢҹ New Version рҹҶ• Small Soft Grain Calfskin Puzzle Edge Handbag
The first debut handbag from L вҠҡ в„® w в„® рҹҶ• *The rectangular shape and precise cutting technology create the Puzzle's unique geometric lines* This small version is made of soft grain calfskin, featuring overlapping edges. The small Puzzle can hold, for example, a large wallet, all sizes of phones, and sunglasses; it can be carried on the shoulder or crossbody* Handheld or top handle carry* Adjustable and detachable shoulder strap* One internal slip pocket and one external back zip pocket* Zip closure with calfskin pull tab* Herringbone cotton canvas lining with Anagram embossing рҹҢҹ
size: 24*10.5*16CM
Model: 062324
(Includes full packaging)
